title: Mascot Integration Boundaries
summary: Documented website mascot integration planning, asset boundaries, and next steps without changing website, character, game, or animation files.

title: Homepage Mascot Hero Integration
summary: Recorded the homepage hero mascot update, optimized web asset placement, registry wiring, responsive CSS, and local static verification.

title: Homepage Identity Polish
summary: Captured the homepage identity polish pass with stronger hero copy, patch-note styling, UI flavor, and brand texture work.

title: Homepage Interaction Polish
summary: Summarized the homepage content and interaction polish pass, including testimonials, project framing, and shared JavaScript/CSS support.

title: Public Page Visual Polish
summary: Aligned About, Projects, Dev Logs, and Contact with the black, white, and red public studio identity and verified the deployed public pages.

title: Public Dev Logs Archive
summary: Built and deployed the public Dev Logs archive with markdown loading, clean routes, direct links, selected states, and public log cleanup.

title: Page-Specific Mascot Assets
summary: Added optimized page-specific mascot assets for Projects, Dev Logs, and Contact while preserving the HERO mascot on Home and About.

title: Visual Alignment and 404 Polish
summary: Cleaned up page hero visuals, aligned the 404 page with the dark studio system, improved mascot spacing, and preserved the working Dev Logs archive.

title: Home Perspective Viewport Grid
summary: Added a Home-only CSS perspective floor grid so the hero reads more like a Blender-style viewport while preserving the static site and existing page behavior.

title: Supporting Page Perspective Floors
summary: Extended the Blender/workspace perspective floor treatment from Home to About, Projects, Dev Logs, and Contact while preserving the static site, Dev Logs archive, page content, and mascot assets.

title: SITE v1.1 Asset Polish Complete
summary: iTryKetchup Studio completed a small post-launch website polish pass focused on the favicon, social preview image, and metadata verification. The site remains in shipped/maintenance mode, with no redesign or feature expansion.

title: Kitchen Wars: The Door Planning Package Complete
summary: Kitchen Wars: The Door completed its planning package. The project now has its Charter, Scope of Work, MVP Plan, Folder Rules, and ParkingLot defined before build work begins. The first version is planned as a standalone vanilla JavaScript / Canvas 3-lane runner-shooter.

title: Kitchen Wars: The Door Is Live
summary: Kitchen Wars: The Door is now playable on the iTryKetchup website as a verified standalone Canvas MVP.

title: Kitchen Wars: The Door v1.1 Is Live
summary: Kitchen Wars: The Door v1.1 is live with art polish, a fridge-door shelf setting, cleaner leaderboard presentation, and mobile touch controls.

title: SITE v1.4 About Page Polish
summary: The About page polish pass is live with stronger hero/workspace styling, a product-tag mascot card, rewritten Studio Identity and STUDIO STATS sections, sauce trail and splatter details, post-it style cards, a fake PowerShell interaction, recipe/lab Build Philosophy cards, responsive checks, and live verification.

title: MASCOT Dev Log - Reviewer Pose Pack Complete
summary: The MASCOT reviewer and pose production package reached 16 of 16 completed visual targets, covering reviewer base variants, iTry utility poses, and the De-Jon Mustard, Mister Mayo, and Jenairic Relish reviewer pose batches.

title: The Wolf Tale Release Hub Is Live
summary: The Wolf Tale now has a dedicated release hub on iTryKetchup Studio, bringing together the current episodes, official script PDF, playlist, and a combined audio player for reading and listening in one place.

title: Kitchen Wars: The Door v1.2 Is Live
summary: Kitchen Wars: The Door v1.2 is live with the verified sound set, fridge ambience, juice/fridge visual polish, and desktop plus mobile public-page verification.

title: SITE v1.8 Web Page Polish Is Live
summary: The public iTryKetchup Studio website received a wide page-polish pass across Home, About, Projects, Dev Logs, Contact, and Wolf Tale, with footer YouTube links, responsive checks, preserved media links, and a new About tech stack reveal.

title: SITE v1.9 Targeted Page Polish Is Live
summary: The public site received a focused polish pass for the About whiteboard hero, Projects list cleanup, and Dev Logs terminal hero with ASCII ketchup-bottle art.

title: SITE v1.10 Dev Logs Hero ASCII Polish Is Live
version: SITE v1.10 Dev Logs Hero ASCII Polish

title: SITE v1.10.1 Dev Logs Structural Polish Is Live
version: SITE v1.10.1 Dev Logs Structural Polish
summary: The public Dev Logs hero received a structural polish pass with a cleaner terminal layout, flush-right text-only ASCII bottle, approved brand splats, blinking cursor, reduced-motion support, and cleaner title spacing.

title: SITE v2.1 Wolf Tale Flyer Page Is Live
version: SITE v2.1 Wolf Tale Flyer Page
summary: The Wolf Tale page is live with the Grayscale Kitchen flyer-on-fridge treatment, a full-color release flyer, a square YouTube-style magnet, preserved EP01/EP02 actions, native audio, and official script access.

summary: Home is live with the Grayscale Kitchen direction, the approved iTry mascot in a grayscale kitchen hero, stable Wolf Tale feature copy, and compact Projects and Dev Logs doors.
